title: Auto Mercado × iRefill — In-Store Refill Expansion (Costa Rica)
trigger_signal: UNDP partnership created a funded mandate for sustainable retail innovation. Auto Mercado leadership committed to piloting refill stations. iRefill machines available for LATAM deployment via CH commercial relationship.
suggested_next_step: Complete May 2026 machine delivery and installation at PDX Guayabos. Resolve dosing + QR compatibility. Execute June launch. Measure sell-through rates. If successful, activate Moravia location and build case for chain-wide expansion.
notes: Live pilot as of Q2 2026. Pilot success = chain-wide expansion opportunity. UNDP funding covers software maintenance Year 1. Revenue model: 15% CH rev share on iRefill sales originated through CH-managed accounts. This brief was created to model the Auto Mercado × iRefill case in the new Opportunity Briefs structure.
why_there_is_fit: Auto Mercado is Costa Rica’s leading premium supermarket with sustainability commitments and UNDP backing for a pilot. iRefill is the lowest-CapEx commercially-ready refill machine provider available to CH. The fit is confirmed by a live pilot in progress. UNDP funding removes financial friction. Auto Mercado has the location density and consumer profile for refill adoption.
pending_action: UNDP partnership created a funded mandate for sustainable retail innovation. Auto Mercado leadership committed to piloting refill stations. iRefill machines available for LATAM deployment via CH commercial relationship.
